# awscc_certificatemanager_acme_endpoint (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::CertificateManager::AcmeEndpoint` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_certificatemanager_acme_endpoint" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
